commentaries.author: Shepherd of Hermas
commentaries.content: But as to the threats of the devil, fear them not at all, for he is powerless as the sinews of a dead man. Give ear to me, then, and fear Him who has all power, both to save and destroy.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: "But I will show you whom ye shall fear: fear Him who, after He hath killed, hath power to cast into hell "(meaning, of course, the Creator); "yea, I say unto you, fear Him."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
